author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Leading - Women-s Order Convention 1987
content:
QUESTIONS AND ANSWERS WITH SANGHARAKSHITA

UNITY OF THE ORDER AND LEADERSHIP AND
RESPONSIBILITY IN THE ORDER
WOMEN'S ORDER CONVENTION 1987
CONTENTS
1 Shabda - possible difficulties of being understood by different cultures - marriage and relationships
6 Alcohol
8 Greater unity in the women's wing of the Order and Bhante's contact with the women's wing and the difficulties of his living in a men's community
16 The women's wing of the Order not being subordinate to the men's wing (as is the case in traditional Buddhist Sanghas)
17 The Order is One, unified, Order
20 Anagarikas acting as unifying factor in the two wings of the Order
21 The future Head of the Order
23 The responsibility of Order members
24 Leadership and charisma
27 Bhante's preference for dharmic questions
29 The importance of Order Chapters for the unity of the Order
31 A plea for more women writers from Bhante
